message:
test(config): add unit tests for archive_maintenance_interval_secs clamping (br-ah24m)

Verify that Config::from_env clamps AM_ARCHIVE_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL_SECS
to [60, 86400], accepts valid mid-range values, and that
AM_ARCHIVE_MAINTENANCE_DISABLED=1 disables the worker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
